sam-uc-√car (-ud-√car) P. -carati, to go out together,  Nir. ;
to go up, be borne upwards, ascend,  MW. ;
to utter, pronounce, repeat,  HPariś.  :
Caus. -cārayati, to utter sounds together, talk together,  MW.
